violations.text: Inspector observed ice and coffee debris in the handwashing sink in the kitchen area next to ice machine. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed staff to use designated dumps sinks to dump beverages during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
Inspector observed bags of trash and debris around shared dumpster area. PIC informed to keep area clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The walls in the back hallway area and behind dishwasher is in poor repair (holes observed). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floors throughout the front counter and kitchen area have an accumulation of soil, food debris, and sticky residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024
Inspector observed a mop bucket with stagnant water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

The floors under equipment and food storage racks in back kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor drains and cabinet beneath (dive-thru) sink and have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The plumbing to the mop sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
